{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221936585129977E8C4F73D17A02"}"},"total":6},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7617502325492122393","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，不过来点不是女的角色"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773591315,"group_id":"7611615751278971928","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一个可能会鸽的作者，所以各位一定不要催我(雾)。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7udMkk4eYSNC+oZPZQkFPY95sPoSXPL09/fTnKWRd7V","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3579635492991304","user_name":"妖神兽山的陆明道"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3579635492991304","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7611615751278971928","book_info":{"abstract":"总结上本书的教训，不要把挂开的太大，导致节奏过快。
————
主角宁中城，斗一时代七宝琉璃宗宁风致的长子，武魂七宝琉璃塔，先天魂力五级。
作为穿越者，不可能平平无奇，双生七宝琉璃塔，一个辅助一个御兽。
大了宁荣荣十岁，宁荣荣觉醒武魂时突破至五十级准魂王。
恰逢狩猎第五魂环之时，动漫聊天群邀请入群。
劳模本子娜，废柴灶神赫斯缇雅和双星阴阳师当中的太阴少女化野红绪。
这个横跨数个动漫世界连接彼此的聊天群将宁中城也拉入其中，会对他原本的人生轨迹，造成多大的变化呢？
敬请期待——动漫聊天群，七宝琉璃宗大少爷。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o130ae74a4f457b6097150c7d1804cb3c~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"金蛟蛇","author_id":"","book_id":"7611615751278971928","book_name":"动漫聊天群，七宝琉璃宗大少爷","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202028","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4946人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":858,"name":"轻小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=858&name=轻小说&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":381,"name":"聊天群","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=381&name=聊天群&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7611615836859531800","read_count":"4946","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"192487"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"83","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,轻小说,聊天群,二次元,穿越,综漫,诸天万界,系统","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o13
